question: Will Donald Trump issue an executive order imposing new tariffs on EU-origin goods by June 14, 2026?
reason: No executive order imposing new tariffs on EU-origin goods has been signed or announced.
evidence: On May 1, 2026, President Trump announced a 25% tariff on EU cars and trucks, effective immediately. ([aljazeera.com](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/1/trump-announces-25-percent-tariffs-on-european-union-cars-trucks?utm_source=openai))

On May 7, 2026, President Trump gave the EU until July 4 to implement a trade deal or face 'much higher' tariffs. ([euronews.com](https://www.euronews.com/my-europe/2026/05/07/trump-gives-eu-until-4-july-to-implement-trade-deal-or-face-much-higher-tariffs?utm_source=openai))
As of May 27, 2026, no new executive orders imposing tariffs on EU-origin goods have been signed or published in the Federal Register.
searchQueries: Donald Trump executive order tariffs EU 2026
